name: ambiguous
_comment: Golden tape for an ambiguous request. User asks 'check on it' with no antecedent. The agent should NOT hallucinate a tool call (no isDangerous, no task-enforcement hit, classifier falls through to chat). It should ask one clarifying question and stop. Single round.

response.content: Happy to — what would you like me to check? A specific server, a deploy, an order, an email thread? Drop the name or a link and I'll go look.
